title: March on Washington
description: A milestone civil rights moment remembered for unity, advocacy, and speeches.

quiz.q: The March on Washington is remembered as what?
quiz.explanation: It was a major civil rights gathering.

quiz.q: Why is this event often studied?
choices: It showed organized advocacy for equality
quiz.explanation: It represented collective advocacy for equality.

quiz.q: The event is strongly linked to what kind of action?
quiz.explanation: It is linked to peaceful protest and civic action.

quiz.q: A major lesson from the March on Washington is what?
quiz.explanation: The event shows the power of collective action.

quiz.q: Why do milestone moment lessons include this event?
choices: It helps explain progress in civil rights history
quiz.explanation: It is central to understanding civil rights history.

title: Montgomery Bus Boycott
description: A powerful civil rights campaign that demonstrated organized community action.

quiz.q: The Montgomery Bus Boycott was a what?
quiz.explanation: It was a civil rights protest campaign.

choices: It showed the power of organized community action
quiz.explanation: It showed the power of collective action.

quiz.q: The boycott teaches students about what?
quiz.explanation: It teaches persistence and civic action.

choices: Refusing to support something to demand change
quiz.explanation: A boycott withdraws support to demand change.

quiz.q: Why is this a milestone moment?
choices: It influenced the civil rights movement
quiz.explanation: It influenced later civil rights action.
